mapper.select: SELECT t.ID AS id, t.QUOTA_CODE AS quotaCode, t.PROJECT_NAME AS projectName, t.PROJECT_CONTENT AS projectContent, t.UNIT AS unit, t.AMOUNT_EXCLUDING_TAX AS amountExcludingTax, t.STATUS AS status, t.CREATE_BY AS createBy, t.CREATE_TIME AS createTime, t.UPDATE_BY AS updateBy, t.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_IC_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA t WHERE t.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_IC_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA ( ID, QUOTA_CODE, PROJECT_NAME, PROJECT_CONTENT, UNIT, AMOUNT_EXCLUDING_TAX, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{quotaCode}, #{projectName}, #{projectContent}, #{unit}, #{amountExcludingTax}, #{status}, #{loginUserId}, #{now}, #{loginUserId}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_IC_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA SET PROJECT_NAME = #{projectName}, PROJECT_CONTENT = #{projectContent}, UNIT = #{unit}, AMOUNT_EXCLUDING_TAX = #{amountExcludingTax}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(t.QUOTA_CODE) FROM E_IC_TENANCE_PROJECT_QUOTA t WHERE t.QUOTA_CODE LIKE ('DE-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || '-%')
